I navigated to the Michaels.com "Track My Order" page and filled in the tracking form with the following details:

After clicking "Track Order", the website returned a **"Not found"** message with the text: **"Please search for another order number."**

This means that order number 12345 with the provided credentials (last name Johnson, email 12345@gmail.com) does not exist in Michaels' system, or the details provided do not match any order on record.
